alerts.headline: High Wind Warning issued April 21 at 9:23AM PDT until April 21 at 11:00PM PDT by NWS Las Vegas NV
alerts.description:
* WHAT...South winds 30 to 40 mph with gusts up to 60 mph possible.

* WHERE...In California, Death Valley National Park. In Nevada,
Esmeralda and Central Nye County.

* WHEN...Until 11 PM PDT this evening.

* IMPACTS...Damaging winds will blow down trees and power lines.
Widespread power outages are expected. Travel will be difficult,
especially for high-profile vehicles. Areas of blowing dust will
likely cause reduced visibility.
alerts.instruction:
Watch for falling debris, tree limbs and downed power lines or
poles. Use extra caution if you must drive.
